pi_items.source: Web search for Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF ISIN; confirmed via multiple sources (justetf.com, Vanguard official docs, Deutsche Börse) as the ISIN for Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF (USD) Distributing Shares
Value matches task description which specifies '500.00 EUR'; 50000 represents amount in cents (50000/100 = 500.00), consistent with expected_amount_display value
Task description explicitly states 'Amount: 500.00 EUR'; consistent with expected_amount (50000 cents = 500.00 EUR)
Task description explicitly states 'Interval: Monthly'; expected_interval matches this requirement
Task description explicitly states 'Start Date: April 1, 2026'; ISO 8601 format (2026-04-01) correctly represents April 1, 2026
setup_task.sh creates this file at exact path and populates it with synthetic XML data containing Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a monthly savings plan in Portfolio Performance for the Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF (ISIN IE00B3RBWM25). The verified plan parameters are: Monthly interval, 500.00 EUR amount (stored as 50000 in system format), and start date of April 1, 2026. The portfolio file is a synthetically generated XML file located at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/savings_plan.xml containing the ETF with hardcoded market data.
